context.projectOverview: Phase 6 — The Medical Team. Numerical reasoning is 100% deterministic in-process TypeScript over a CLOSED whitelist; the LLM NEVER performs arithmetic. This sprint (S4) adds HealthDataStore (better-sqlite3 single-table, mirroring FactStore) + NumericsQueryLayer (8-primitive whitelist).

completedSprints.title: Red-flag short-circuit (Gate 2)
completedSprints.summary: 6fc7c97 — MedicalSopDeps has llmClient?+numerics? slots; engine has consent->redflag->placeholder-allow.

criticalConstraints: HealthDataStore (suggest src/medical/health-store.ts) MUST MIRROR FactStore (src/state/facts.ts): better-sqlite3 SYNC, single generic events table, CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS, INSERT OR IGNORE on a deterministic SHA-256 id of (metric|tStart|source|value) computed with createHash exactly like factId (facts.ts:58-69). Do NOT invent a new DB pattern. Reuse the same import style for better-sqlite3.

upsertObservations returns the count of NEW rows ONLY (sum info.changes from INSERT OR IGNORE). A test inserts duplicates and asserts the count is new-rows-only. Methods: upsertObservations, getObservations, getLabSeries, getBaseline, putBaseline, getPreference.

NumericsQueryLayer (suggest src/medical/numerics.ts) exposes ONLY the closed whitelist: mean|min|max|latest|delta|slope|percentile|zscore + getLabTrend. NumericResult { primitive, value:number|null, unit, sampleCount }. Empty window => { value:null, sampleCount:0 } (ABSTAIN — never throw). zscore with n<2 abstains. Each primitive computes the correct value on a fixture series (use hand-computable formulas from the briefing).
NumericsQueryLayer reads the per-row unit and REFUSES to aggregate across heterogeneous units (per ADR-4) rather than silently mixing them.

ABSOLUTELY NO eval, Function constructor, vm, code generation, or child process (child_process/execa) anywhere in src/medical numerics code. A grep/readFileSync test (sc-4-8) must assert this. The LLM never performs arithmetic.
Timestamps (observation tStart) are INJECTED parameters, never wall-clock.

ESM/NodeNext .js extensions; strict TS; no SDK types outside src/providers/; better-sqlite3 sync is the ONLY allowed sync fs (per principles, sqlite store mirrors FactStore). Tests use temp-dir DBs + cleanup (no fs mocks). Add types additively to src/medical/types.ts.

Do NOT wire the full SOP into the engine this sprint (that is S6) — but the NumericsQueryLayer should be shaped to plug into deps.numerics later. nonGoals: NO ingestion (S5), NO egress/full SOP (S6), NO retrieval (S7).
